narrative: Fresh US military strikes on Iran and the RBNZ's hawkish 25bp rate hike to 2.50% dominate the session — USD/JPY firms to 162.38 on a +275bp OIS carry advantage, while NZD/USD bids to 0.5697. The geopolitical escalation supports the dollar as gold falls -0.89%; equities retreat -0.45%; DXY consolidates +0.13%; VIX rises 16.1. Watch the FOMC Minutes at 18:00 UTC for the next major policy catalyst.
